base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brick_block_shatter — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1985 super mario bros. 4 fragments fly outward in Xs arc as block explodes. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame shatter-burst — 4 fragments fly outward in Xs arc as block explodes; each fragment rotates once; spawns at block centerpoint
